'''Tom Gilmore''' (born 2 February 1994) is a [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sh}} or {{rlp|so}} for the [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

He played for the [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[Super League]] and the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], and on loan from [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] at the [[North Wales Crusaders]] and the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. Gilmore has also played for [[Halifax RLFC|Halifax]] in the Championship, and on loan from [[Halifax RLFC|'Fax]] at the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Gilmore was born in Widnes, Cheshire, England.

==Career==
===Widnes Vikings===
He made his début as a substitute in the victory against the [[London Broncos]] in 2012, but his first starting appearance had to wait until April 2013 against the [[Huddersfield Giants]].<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/huddersfield/huddersfield-giants-62-widnes-vikings-6-betts-calls-for-change-after-giants-destroy-his-vikings-1-5542078|title=Huddersfield Giants 62 Widnes Vikings 6: Betts calls for change after Giants destroy his Vikings|newspaper=Yorkshire Post|date=2 April 2013|accessdate= 3 April 2013}}</ref>

On 26 February 2015 Gilmore joined the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] on a one-month loan deal.<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.superleague.co.uk/article/31713/gilmore-joins-broncos-on-loan|title=Gilmore joins Broncos on loan deal|date= 26 February 2015}}</ref>

===Halifax===
On 25 September 2020 it was announced that Gilmore would join [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] on loan.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/54301718|title=Salford Red Devils: Tom Gilmore & Olly Ashall-Bott join on loan|work=BBC Sport |accessdate=18 Dec 2020}}</ref>

===Batley Bulldogs===
On 17 November 2020 it was announced that Gilmore would join the [[Batley Bulldogs]] for the 2021 season.<ref>{{cite web|website=www.rugby-league.com|date=17 November 2020|accessdate=3 Jan 2021|title=Tom Gilmore joins Batley|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/57380/tom-gilmore-joins-batley}}</ref>

===Widnes Vikings (re-join)===
On 10 October 2022 it was announced that Gilmore had re-joined the [[Widnes Vikings]] on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://widnesvikings.co.uk/gilmores-vikings-return-confirmed/ |title=Gilmore's Vikings return confirmed |website=Widnes Vikings |date=10 October 2022 |access-date=31 October 2022}}</ref>

==International career==
In July 2018 he was selected in the [[England Knights]] Performance squad.<ref name="Ten new additions in England Knights squad">{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/ten-new-additions-in-england-knights-squad/|title=Ten new additions in England Knights squad|publisher=loverugbyleague|date=24 July 2018|accessdate=31 October 2019}}</ref>
